'''Midakos''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Ovise V]], in the [[Ovise system/Legends|Ovise system]] of the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]].<ref name="gamer9" />

Midakos was a [[Temperature/Legends|frigid]], [[Water/Legends|glacier]]-covered satellite, and the third moon of Ovise V. It was inhabited by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Vashan]], though the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] required the population to wear [[Breath mask/Legends|breath masks]]. A [[Standard day/Legends|standard day]] lasted for 43 [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]], and a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] consisted of 245 days.<ref name="gamer9" />
